response.justification: Strong full-stack background with 10+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), matching the primary stack and the AI agent development requirement. Solid track record across React, Node.js, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes. Some gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically, but the breadth and depth of experience strongly suggest rapid ramp-up.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (robotic arms era)
Heavy investment in DLang ecosystem may signal preference for niche stacks
